Creates a local builtin tool provider catalog.

## Import

```ts
import { localBuiltinToolProviderCatalog } from "@graphrefly/ts/orchestration";
```

## Signature

```ts
function localBuiltinToolProviderCatalog(opts: LocalBuiltinToolProviderCatalogOptions = {}): ToolProviderCatalog
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `LocalBuiltinToolProviderCatalogOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

The local builtin tool provider catalog result.

## Example

```ts
import { localBuiltinToolProviderCatalog } from "@graphrefly/ts/orchestration";
```
